title: chamaemelum inodorum var. maritimum
intro: Chamaemelum inodorum var. maritimum, also known as sea chamomile, is a coastal variety of the Anthemis maritima plant, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and calming effects. The plant's essential oils have been found to have various health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting relaxation. Sea chamomile can be prepared as an herbal tea, oil, or topical cream, and is often used in aromatherapy and natural skincare products.
